name: guildhall
description: The Guildhall — a gathering place for adventurers. A TDD-ordered coding agent harness for Claude Code, tuned for Opus 4.7. The /quest slash command runs Mordain the Guildmaster, who writes a durable plan file, then dispatches 11 specialist adventurers across three tiers: Opus (architecture-reviewer, security-reviewer), Sonnet (test-author, feature-implementer, refactorer, ui-test-author, docs-writer, pr-author, prototype-builder, debug-investigator), and Haiku (plugin-validator). Post-green reviews run in parallel; Rook (pr-author) closes the quest with a platform-agnostic PR draft. Integrates with IDD-framework specs.
